sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁנאן

Transliteration: shin'ân

Phonetic: shin-awn'

BDB Definition:

  1. repetition
    1. repetitions, twice-told repetition, twice ten thousands, thousands of repetitions, twice-told thousands
      1. myriads (in effect)

Origin: from H8132

TWOT entry: 2421d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
